steps: Contact RBC Investor Services to request refund of CAD 4,077.00 overpayment on BMO dividend for account 1401234567
Provide documentation showing CA-NO treaty entitles Norwegian resident to 15% withholding tax rate, not the 13.5% applied
Submit formal reclaim with treaty certification and resident documentation to support the 15% treaty rate claim
If RBC cannot process directly, file reclaim with CRA using NR7-R form for treaty-based withholding tax adjustment

references.title: CRA – Rates for Part XIII Tax (WHT rates & treaty reduction)
